content: The provider of this website within the meaning of Section 5 of the German Data Protection Act (DDG) is
Dr. jur. Kraemer Commercial Law Firm
Registered office: Cologne, Cologne Local Court HRB 123210
The company is represented by the managing director
Dr. jur. Raimonda Kraemer, LL.M. – commercial lawyer.
Aurelija Maumevičė, LL.M. – lawyer (Lithuania), admitted under Section 2 of the EuRAG.
Admitted to practise law in Lithuania and, since 21 May 2025, also a member of the Cologne Bar Association.
The law firm of Dr R. Kraemer has offices in Cologne (head office) and Düsseldorf (branch office).
Geographical scope: Europe (excluding Belarus, Ukraine, Russian Federation)
- International law between Germany and Lithuania

The firm combines legal expertise in insolvency and restructuring law (Solicitor Aurelija Maumevičė) with commercial legal advice (Dr. jur. Raimonda Kraemer, LL.M.) and thus offers interdisciplinary, cross-border advice, particularly in German-Lithuanian legal and commercial relations.

In the event of disputes between lawyers and their clients, there is the option, upon application, of out-of-court dispute resolution at the Cologne Bar Association or at the Bar Association’s Conciliation Board (Section 191f BRAO) at the German Federal Bar Association, Neue Grünstraße 17, 10179 Berlin – www.schlichtungsstelle-der-rechtsanwaltschaft.de, email: schlichtungsstelle@s-d-r.org.
Dr. jur. Kraemer GmbH does not participate in dispute resolution proceedings before a consumer arbitration board.
The EU platform for online out-of-court dispute resolution can be found at: https://ec.europa.eu/consumers/odr/.
- BORA – Professional Code of Conduct for Lawyers – https://www.brak.de
- FAO – Regulations on Specialist Lawyers – https://www.brak.de
- CCBE Code of Conduct – Code of Conduct for Lawyers in the European Community – https://www.brak.de

Every effort has been made to ensure that the content of this website is accurate and up to date. However, we accept no liability for external links. The operators of linked sites are solely responsible for their content.
The information provided on this website is for general information purposes only and does not constitute legal advice.
